artPrompt: An imposing older woman in a gray government suit dominates the wide frame, one hand pinning a die to the desk, the other voiding a coin with a dismissive flick, her cold eyes lit by a single overhead fluorescent. Stacks of blank ledgers climb into shadow behind her. A faint arcane glimmer rises from the paperwork, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Senior Auditor of Outcomes
text: Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice, you may reroll one of them. Whenever an opponent flips one or more coins, you may reflip one of them. You choose which result is entered into the official record.
flavorText: "Luck is just an unaudited variable," she said, voiding the natural 20.
